comments.body: Apparently this managed to break completely-unrelated images tests?
Filter before image is broken in master

Changes LGTM, but tests aren't hip @mheon, I'm not sure if it's related or not.

OK, in case this was not clear. Please do not put things into the merge queue until all of your statuses are successful, or the automation just thrashes trying to merge.
